validation_rules: require macro projection protocol refs and public runtime refs
resolve public paper claims to evidence cell ids
require source-anchor refs on proof-language evidence cells
require machine-anchor class metadata before proof language
reject proof-language claims without cell ids
reject proof bodies and private source refs
reject human approval as proof authority
reject theorem-correctness claims from metadata cells
emit secret-exclusion scan and real runtime receipt contract
receipt_expectations: receipt must cite source refs, source pattern ids, projection receipts, public runtime refs, claim counts, resolved cell counts, source-anchor counts, negative-case coverage, secret-exclusion scan, body-in-receipt policy, real-runtime receipt status, synthetic standin refusal, and anti-claim
anti_claim: This standard governs real runtime evidence-cell anchor receipts; it does not prove theorem correctness, authorize Lean/Lake execution, expose non-receipt proof bodies or credential-equivalent private source refs, treat human approval as proof authority, or authorize release/publication work.

standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe evidence-cell anchor resolver: paper claims, evidence cells, source anchors, machine-anchor classes, claim-strength boundaries, receipts, and leakage negative cases.
standard_payload.teleology: Make Microcosm demonstrate proof-evidence legibility while preserving the boundary between evidence metadata and theorem correctness.
standard_payload.anti_purpose: Turning evidence-cell metadata into proof authority.
failure_modes: claim references unknown cell while using proof language
proof language has no evidence cell id
claim row leaks private source ref
metadata cell is treated as theorem correctness
human approval is treated as proof authority

secret_exclusion_receipt.reason: this organ carries real evidence-cell anchor receipts; excluded material is limited to non-receipt proof bodies, credential-equivalent private refs, provider payloads, and execution receipts owned by other organs

anti_claim_contract.rule: formal evidence-cell material must state that anchor metadata is not theorem correctness

source_coupling_contract.rule: macro source refs and public runtime refs stay public-root relative; synthetic standins are not acceptable positive evidence
